task: place blue plastic bottle into top drawer
raw:
Scene: blue_plastic_bottle, top_drawer, table
Step 1: reach(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_plastic_bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_plastic_bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the neck of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: holding(blue_plastic_bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_plastic_bottle)
Step 3: transport(blue_plastic_bottle -> top_drawer)
  affordance_region: the empty area inside the top drawer
  spatial: above(blue_plastic_bottle, top_drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_plastic_bottle)
  done_when: above(blue_plastic_bottle, top_drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(blue_plastic_bottle -> top_drawer)
  affordance_region: the empty area inside the top drawer
  contact: surface_contact(blue_plastic_bottle, top_drawer) [completion]; released(blue_plastic_bottle) [completion]
  pose: stable(blue_plastic_bottle) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(blue_plastic_bottle, top_drawer) AND released(blue_plastic_bottle) AND stable(blue_plastic_bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>
